works.title: Neon Drift
works.description:
A study in motion and light — rendered over three sleepless nights with a custom shader pipeline. The city breathes here; every frame is a heartbeat.

Explored the intersection of brutalist architecture and organic light diffusion. The colour palette draws from Tokyo's Shinjuku ward at 3am.

works.title: Bone Structure
works.description:
A series of five studies exploring organic form through a minimalist lens. Shot on 35mm, scanned, then processed through a custom colour grading pipeline.

The light source is a single bare bulb. Nothing else.

works.title: The Collapse Equation
works.description:
Generative music visualiser — the waveform drives the geometry in real time. Built with a custom WebGL renderer and live audio input.

Premiered at MUTEK Montréal 2024. Runtime: 12 minutes.

works.title: Soft Infrastructure
works.description:
Brand identity for a fictional civic data cooperative. The visual language borrows from 1970s systems diagrams and rewires them for a world of distributed trust.

Delivered: wordmark, type system, colour palette, motion guidelines, and environmental applications.
